listings.author: Aarav S.
listings.text: NO BROKERAGE — 2 BHK semi-furnished flat available for rent in Andheri West, near the metro. Spacious, airy, 2 bathrooms, covered parking. Ideal for a small family or working professionals. Rent 42000/- + deposit. Immediate possession. Call 90000 11111 for a visit.

listings.author: Priya M.
listings.text: Female flatmate wanted for single occupancy in a fully furnished 2BHK in Powai. Pure-veg, working professionals only. Rent 18000 all inclusive. Ready to move in. WhatsApp 90000 22222.

listings.author: Rohan K.
listings.text: 1RK available on rent opposite Nesco, Goregaon East. Fully furnished, walking distance from Nirlon Knowledge Park. No brokerage. 16500/month. DM 90000 33333.

listings.author: Sneha D.
listings.text: Male flatmate needed to share a room in a 3BHK in Kharadi, Pune. Double occupancy, close to EON IT Park. Semi-furnished. Rent 9500 per head + deposit. Contact 90000 44444.
